description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the daewok/lisp-devel Docker image. Define stages test and build, and a global before_script that runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y git-core, and make install before each job. Add a build job in the build stage that runs make build, saves the torrents directory as an artifact, and runs only for tag pipelines. Add a build-gui job in the build stage that runs make build-gui and saves the torrents-tk directory as an artifact. Add an e2e job in the test stage that runs only for trigger pipelines and executes make test-end2end. Add a test job in the test stage that runs only for tag pipelines and executes make test.
